data.name: Oceanlust: Erotic Descent 🔞
data.detailed_description:
• About:

You’ve won a free seat on the maiden voyage of SafeXpeditions, a startup offering deep-sea tourism aboard a prototype submarine. The itinerary: descend for several hours, explore the wreck of the Gigantic, try not to think about the pressure outside.

The crew includes Jack, the CEO who won’t shut up about “brand trust,” and Francis, your upbeat guide who is definitely not paid enough for this.

Also onboard is Mari. She’s beautiful, absurdly wealthy, and clearly not here for the history lesson. Stuck in a confined space with a stranger, she gets curious. Maybe bold. Maybe more.

Turns out the wreck isn’t the only thing getting explored on this trip...

  • Features:

- A cinematic erotic comedy set during a questionable submarine tour.
- Richly illustrated scenes in 2D style.
- Explicit sex scenes woven into the story.
- Multiple endings shaped by your choices.
- Carefully crafted audio including music, ambient design, and in-scene effects
data.about_the_game:
• About:

You’ve won a free seat on the maiden voyage of SafeXpeditions, a startup offering deep-sea tourism aboard a prototype submarine. The itinerary: descend for several hours, explore the wreck of the Gigantic, try not to think about the pressure outside.

data.short_description: A once-in-a-lifetime dive to the bottom of the ocean. The sexy daughter of a billionaire at your side. A submarine that probably passed a few safety checks. What could possibly go wrong?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 義大利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 2.0+ Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X
  • 處理器: 2.0+ Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 2.0+ Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
